page_content:
LATN304 Cicero and Sallust (3 Credits) Selected speeches of Cicero and selections from the historian Sallust. Rhetorical, social and political context. Readings are in Latin. Prerequisite: LATN201; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

LATN351 Horace and Catullus (3 Credits) Readings are in Latin. Prerequisite: LATN201; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
